game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: StickWars is a fast-paced castle defense game where players defend their kingdom against waves of stick figure enemies advancing from the right side of the screen towards their castle on the left. Players eliminate enemies by tapping individual stick figures to launch basic projectiles, or by flicking the screen to deploy a volley of arrows from the castle. Special abilities include shaking the device to deploy a bomber plane that drops explosives, requiring a second shake to detonate, and using multi-touch gestures to command wizards to cast powerful area-of-effect spells like meteors. Defeated stick figures drop resources, which are automatically collected and used to upgrade castle defenses or unlock new defensive structures, allowing players to survive an unlimited number of increasingly difficult rounds where enemy spawn rates and health points gradually increase. The game ends when the castle's health points, typically starting at 100, are depleted by invading enemies.
game_info.description: Defend your castle against endless waves of stick figure invaders! Enemies march from the right toward your castle on the left. Shoot projectiles at individual enemies with Z, unleash arrow volleys with SPACE, and deploy powerful special attacks with SHIFT. Collect resources from defeated enemies to upgrade your defenses. Survive as long as possible - the waves never stop getting harder!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move targeting cursor
Z: Fire basic projectile at cursor position
SPACE: Launch arrow volley from castle
SHIFT: Deploy bomber plane (press again to detonate)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and combat testing. Validates that the player can use the targeting cursor to aim and fire projectiles at enemies, and that projectiles correctly damage and eliminate enemies.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the cursor around the screen to track enemies and fire basic projectiles (Z) at them. Test volley attacks (SPACE) periodically. Verify that enemies take damage and die when hit.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully eliminates multiple enemies using different attack types. The game should register hits, enemies should die, and resources should be collected. The test passes if no crashes occur and combat mechanics work correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition validation - survival through multiple waves with optimal strategy. Tests if the game can be won by effectively using all abilities and upgrades to survive increasingly difficult enemy waves.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implement an optimal combat strategy: prioritize closest enemies with basic shots, use volleys when multiple enemies cluster, deploy bomber planes strategically, and upgrade castle health and damage as resources allow. Focus fire on high-health enemies.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should demonstrate extended survival through multiple increasingly difficult waves. Castle health should be managed effectively. Resources should accumulate and be spent on upgrades. Test is successful when surviving 10+ waves without game over.
